item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Men are NOT becoming more conservative
item.description: Headlines claim a new study was released saying that GenZ men are becoming much more conservative than women. Issues with the "study"? 1. Online respondents via webpage form, no effort to remove botnet or multiple replies 2. Biased wording of questions 3. Insufficient responses from some countries to provide accurate statistical analysis where study claims definitive results 4. Study summary claims "both men & women are becoming more conservative but men are changing at a faster rate"; published data shows both are becoming more LIBERAL. 5. Study summary claims conservatism by men and women is being led by an increase in active religion among Gen Z. There are literally no questions within the study about religion so even if the rest of the study were accurate it would be impossible to tell if religion was a factor.
item.dc:creator: meauho

item.title: Celebrities and their ages
item.description:
18 year old Britney Spears in 1999
24 year old Cameron Diaz in 1996
20 year old Drew Barrymore in 1995
19 year old Tyra Banks in 1993
30 year old Meryl Streep in 1979
25 year old Audrey Hepburn in 1954
16 year old Elizabeth Taylor in 1948
18 year old Judy Garland in 1940
24 year old Claudette Colbert in 1928

item.title: It's the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
glad i grew up in a non-religious family, eating right away is huge
did a hot air balloon ride once when i was a kid. i remember being bored after the ascent
as is tradition
looking at it hurts my brain
i know i've seen at least 4
mmm hmm
finally
i think i understand. now tell me about that pie
whatever that means
season 1 of True Detective is gold
i can't do tunnels.. to claustrophobic
wow, this one looks real
what else could it mean?
sprut
most grammar errors don't bother me but unnecessary apostrophe usage is out of control these days
who could forget that
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The stele of Thonis-Heracleion being raised from the sea where it had been for over a thousand years, one of the greatest submerged discoveries ever in ancient Egypt. It was created by Pharaoh Nectanebo I

item.title: A post to make your day a bit better
item.description: I hope this post made your day a bit better. The Imgur community has helped me in the past few days when I was in need, I figured it was the least I could do. Thanks again to anyone who helped on my post https://imgur.com/gallery/GrSUtyO . I can't put into words how much the support meant to me, how much the food was needed

item.title: This is how I winter now
item.description:
I bought myself this knitting machine for Birthmas (my birthday + Christmas). The winters here are very long. Some days I manage to bundle up and go out. That is not most days for me. So I wanted something to do where I can feel like I have a 'win,' and I'm not just reaching the end of Netflix.
14+--that's me!
It can also make panels! Two tubes and 4 panels is a sweater! That's craft math.
Current sweater project
Eat your heart out, rainbow friends.
Leelu tax! Someone needs to oversee these things.
item.dc:creator: kittycatnhedgie

mood
quack
bonk
uwu
No.
I googled Buck-ees and it's...a chain of giant petrol stations?
The Neurodivergent Stance
a
Harry Potter, when read critically, is really fucked up.
What was done to the Cathars was horrible.
